title: tanacetum alyssifolium
intro: Tanacetum alyssifolium, also known as Tansy-leaved pyrethrum or Pyrethrum alyssifolium, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe. Its medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum alyssifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Tanacetum alyssifolium include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
